meaning: n.糖果,蜜饯vt.调制,配制,(尤指)混合调制,把...制成糖果
examples: It used in confect a series of essence of coffee, herb, fumes and tobacco.
Supply Mode: Supplied by powder and liquid materials. The customers can confect to use on spot.
The fig confect which is prepared with palapinit has the characteristics of low calorie and weakly dental caries.
